headline: Ethereum Surges 20% Amid Bullish Long-Term Outlook

article.title: Bitcoin 'Pizza Day' was 16 years ago, here's how much that BTC is worth today
article.summary: Laszlo Hanyecz's 2010 post, offering 10,000 BTC in exchange for two pizzas delivered to his home, marked the first recorded commercial BTC payment.

headline: India Hikes Fuel Prices 3rd Time in 8 Days

article.title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
article.summary: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.

headline: US Stocks Rise 1.2% on Garcia Case Dismissal

article.title: Abrego Garcia Wins Dismissal of US Human-Smuggling Case
article.summary: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed human-smuggling charges against Salvadoran migrant Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia after concluding the US government brought the case in retaliation for his legal fight against being deported.
